title: Wave 2 Optimization - 100-Question Validation Suite
description: Comprehensive test suite for Wave 2 tier routing, ML-based routing, health monitoring, and production deployment covering all components with edge cases

questions.question: Route a query for recent data (3 days old) to the master tier

expected_results.rationale: Recent data (<7 days) should route to hot tier (Master) for optimal performance

questions.question: Route a semantic search query with embeddings to PGVector tier

expected_results.rationale: Embeddings/similarity queries prioritize PGVector regardless of data age

questions.question: Route historical data query (30 days) to MinIO tier

expected_results.rationale: Historical data (7-90 days) routes to cold tier (MinIO) for cost efficiency

questions.question: Route archive analytics query (180 days) to Athena tier

expected_results.rationale: Archive data (>90 days) routes to Athena for large-scale analytics

questions.question: Handle boundary condition: exactly 7 days old (tier boundary)

expected_results.rationale: Boundary at 7 days: <=7 goes to Master, >7 goes to MinIO

questions.question: Handle boundary condition: exactly 90 days old (MinIO/Athena boundary)

expected_results.rationale: Boundary at 90 days: <=90 goes to MinIO, >90 goes to Athena

questions.question: Route query with conflicting parameters (embeddings + historical)

expected_results.rationale: Embeddings take priority over temporal criteria

questions.question: Route query with zero days_back (today's data)

expected_results.rationale: Today's data (days_back=0) is hottest possible, routes to Master

questions.question: Route query for very old archive data (365+ days)

expected_results.rationale: Very old data (>365 days) routes to Athena for massive scalability

questions.question: Verify routing metrics tracking accuracy

expected_results.rationale: Each route_query() call must update stats correctly

questions.pass_criteria: total_queries increased by 1 AND tier_counts['master'] increased by 1

questions.question: Calculate routing percentage correctly for 100 queries

expected_results.rationale: 60% of queries should route to non-master tiers

questions.question: Handle disabled router (feature flag off)

expected_results.rationale: When TIER_ROUTER_ENABLED=false, all queries go to Master

questions.question: Handle missing days_back parameter (default to 0)

expected_results.rationale: Missing days_back should default to 0 (today)

questions.question: Verify average routing overhead across 1000 queries

expected_results.rationale: Average overhead should be <0.005ms, P95 <0.01ms per Wave 2 targets

questions.question: Route query with negative days_back (invalid input)

expected_results.rationale: Negative days_back is invalid, should clamp to 0 or error gracefully

questions.pass_criteria: tier == 'master' AND (days_back clamped OR error handled gracefully)

questions.question: Route large batch query (10M+ rows estimated)

expected_results.rationale: Very large queries benefit from Athena's scalability

questions.question: Handle empty query_params dict

expected_results.rationale: Empty params should apply defaults and route to Master

questions.question: Concurrent routing: 10 parallel queries

expected_results.rationale: Router must be thread-safe for concurrent queries

questions.pass_criteria: total_queries == 10 AND tier_counts sum to 10 AND no exceptions

questions.question: Route query when MinIO tier disabled in config

expected_results.rationale: Disabled tiers should fallback to master

questions.question: Route query when Athena tier disabled in config

expected_results.rationale: Disabled tiers should fallback to master

questions.question: Verify tier_distribution_pct metric calculation

expected_results.rationale: Percentage distribution should match actual query counts

questions.question: Get routing metrics when zero queries executed

expected_results.rationale: Metrics should handle zero state gracefully

questions.question: Route similarity search without explicit embedding flag

expected_results.rationale: similarity_search implies embeddings needed

questions.question: Verify failover_count metric tracking

expected_results.rationale: Failover events should increment counter

questions.question: Sustained high query load (10,000 queries)

expected_results.rationale: Router should handle high throughput without degradation

questions.pass_criteria: all queries complete AND avg_overhead < 0.01ms AND no memory leaks

questions.question: ML router predicts optimal tier for complex query pattern

expected_results.rationale: ML model should predict tier based on learned patterns

questions.pass_criteria: ML prediction used AND inference_time < 50ms AND confidence > 0.7

questions.question: ML router falls back to static routing when confidence low

expected_results.rationale: Low confidence ML predictions should fallback to static routing rules

questions.pass_criteria: ml_fallback == True AND tier selected by static rules

questions.question: Extract features correctly from query parameters

expected_results.rationale: Feature extraction must handle all parameter types correctly

questions.pass_criteria: 10 features extracted AND no NaN AND all numeric

questions.question: Train ML model with 1000 synthetic query examples

expected_results.rationale: Model should train successfully with balanced synthetic data

questions.question: Handle prediction with confidence exactly at threshold (0.7)

expected_results.rationale: Confidence == threshold should use ML prediction (not fallback)

questions.question: Pattern analyzer test 6: query pattern classification

expected_results.rationale: Classify query pattern based on parameters (test 6)

questions.pass_criteria: pattern_type is not None AND classification_confidence > 0.6

questions.question: Pattern analyzer test 7: query pattern classification

expected_results.rationale: Classify query pattern based on parameters (test 7)

questions.pass_criteria: pattern_type is not None AND classification_confidence > 0.6

questions.question: Pattern analyzer test 8: query pattern classification

expected_results.rationale: Classify query pattern based on parameters (test 8)

questions.pass_criteria: pattern_type is not None AND classification_confidence > 0.6

questions.question: Pattern analyzer test 9: query pattern classification

expected_results.rationale: Classify query pattern based on parameters (test 9)

questions.pass_criteria: pattern_type is not None AND classification_confidence > 0.6

questions.question: Pattern analyzer test 10: query pattern classification

expected_results.rationale: Classify query pattern based on parameters (test 10)

questions.pass_criteria: pattern_type is not None AND classification_confidence > 0.6

questions.question: Adaptive threshold adjusts under 50% load

expected_results.rationale: Thresholds should adjust dynamically at 50% load

questions.pass_criteria: threshold adjustment matches expected for load level

questions.question: Adaptive threshold adjusts under 60% load

expected_results.rationale: Thresholds should adjust dynamically at 60% load

questions.pass_criteria: threshold adjustment matches expected for load level

expected_results.rationale: Thresholds should adjust dynamically at 70% load

questions.pass_criteria: threshold adjustment matches expected for load level

expected_results.rationale: Thresholds should adjust dynamically at 80% load

questions.pass_criteria: threshold adjustment matches expected for load level

questions.question: Adaptive threshold adjusts under 90% load

expected_results.rationale: Thresholds should adjust dynamically at 90% load

questions.pass_criteria: threshold adjustment matches expected for load level

questions.question: A/B test variant assignment (test 16)

expected_results.rationale: Consistent variant assignment based on hash(user_id)

questions.pass_criteria: same user_id always gets same variant

questions.question: A/B test variant assignment (test 17)

expected_results.rationale: Consistent variant assignment based on hash(user_id)

questions.pass_criteria: same user_id always gets same variant

expected_results.rationale: Consistent variant assignment based on hash(user_id)

questions.pass_criteria: same user_id always gets same variant

questions.question: A/B test variant assignment (test 19)

expected_results.rationale: Consistent variant assignment based on hash(user_id)

questions.pass_criteria: same user_id always gets same variant

questions.question: A/B test variant assignment (test 20)

expected_results.rationale: Consistent variant assignment based on hash(user_id)

questions.pass_criteria: same user_id always gets same variant

questions.question: A/B test statistical significance with 1000 samples

expected_results.rationale: 15% improvement with 1000 samples should be statistically significant

questions.question: Save and load ML model (persistence round-trip)

expected_results.rationale: Saved and loaded model should make identical predictions

questions.pass_criteria: model loaded successfully AND predictions match pre-save

questions.question: Batch predict 100 queries efficiently

expected_results.rationale: Batch prediction should be ~10x faster than serial

questions.question: Get feature importance from trained model

expected_results.rationale: days_back should be most important feature for tier selection

questions.pass_criteria: 10 features AND sum(importance) ≈ 1.0 AND days_back rank == 1

questions.question: Export query patterns as ML training data

expected_results.rationale: Pattern analyzer should export data in ML-ready format

questions.pass_criteria: 100 samples exported AND all have features + labels

questions.question: Health check detects healthy tier (Master)

expected_results.rationale: Tier with <100ms latency should be marked healthy

questions.question: Health check detects degraded tier (high latency)

expected_results.rationale: Latency 100-500ms should mark tier as degraded but available

questions.question: Health check detects unavailable tier (connection failed)

expected_results.rationale: Connection failures should mark tier as unavailable

questions.question: MinIO fails, fallback to Master

expected_results.rationale: When minio unavailable, should failover to master

questions.question: Athena fails, fallback to MinIO

expected_results.rationale: When athena unavailable, should failover to minio

questions.question: Athena + MinIO fail, fallback to Master

expected_results.rationale: When athena unavailable, should failover to master

questions.question: PGVector fails, fallback to Master

expected_results.rationale: When pgvector unavailable, should failover to master

questions.question: All tiers fail, ultimate fallback to Master

expected_results.rationale: When all_tiers unavailable, should failover to master

questions.question: Circuit breaker opens after 3 consecutive failures

expected_results.rationale: Circuit breaker should open after max_consecutive_failures threshold

questions.pass_criteria: circuit_breaker_open == True AND tier excluded from routing

questions.question: Circuit breaker closes after tier recovers

expected_results.rationale: Successful health check should reset circuit breaker

questions.question: Concurrent health checks for all tiers (test 11)

expected_results.rationale: Parallel health checks should complete faster than serial

questions.question: Concurrent health checks for all tiers (test 12)

expected_results.rationale: Parallel health checks should complete faster than serial

questions.question: Concurrent health checks for all tiers (test 13)

expected_results.rationale: Parallel health checks should complete faster than serial

questions.question: Concurrent health checks for all tiers (test 14)

expected_results.rationale: Parallel health checks should complete faster than serial

questions.question: Concurrent health checks for all tiers (test 15)

expected_results.rationale: Parallel health checks should complete faster than serial

questions.question: Start and stop background health monitoring thread

expected_results.rationale: Background monitoring thread should start/stop without hanging

questions.pass_criteria: thread started AND stopped without timeout

questions.question: Track health history for last 100 checks

expected_results.rationale: Health history should maintain fixed size with FIFO eviction

questions.question: Get list of available tiers from health monitor

expected_results.rationale: Degraded tiers are still available, only unavailable excluded

questions.question: Select best available tier from preference list

expected_results.rationale: First available tier in preference list should be selected

questions.question: Handle health check timeout (tier unresponsive)

expected_results.rationale: Timeouts should mark tier as unavailable

questions.question: End-to-end query flow: 20 days historical data

expected_results.rationale: Full query flow for 20-day data should complete successfully

questions.question: End-to-end query flow: 40 days historical data

expected_results.rationale: Full query flow for 40-day data should complete successfully

questions.question: End-to-end query flow: 60 days historical data

expected_results.rationale: Full query flow for 60-day data should complete successfully

questions.question: End-to-end query flow: 80 days historical data

expected_results.rationale: Full query flow for 80-day data should complete successfully

questions.question: End-to-end query flow: 100 days historical data

expected_results.rationale: Full query flow for 100-day data should complete successfully

questions.question: 5% canary deployment

expected_results.rationale: Traffic should split 5% to Wave 2, 95% to Wave 1

questions.question: 25% traffic ramp

expected_results.rationale: Traffic should split 25% to Wave 2, 75% to Wave 1

questions.question: 50% traffic ramp

expected_results.rationale: Traffic should split 50% to Wave 2, 50% to Wave 1

questions.question: 100% full production

expected_results.rationale: Traffic should split 100% to Wave 2, 0% to Wave 1

questions.question: Emergency rollback to 0%

expected_results.rationale: Traffic should split 0% to Wave 2, 100% to Wave 1

questions.question: Validate <5 minute rollback time

expected_results.rationale: Emergency rollback should complete in <5 minutes

questions.question: Validate capacity for 2x traffic spike

expected_results.rationale: System should handle 2x traffic with <50% latency increase

questions.question: Hot-reload tier router configuration without restart

expected_results.rationale: Config changes should apply without service restart

questions.question: Validate all Wave 2 performance SLAs met

expected_results.rationale: All Wave 2 SLAs must be met in production

questions.question: Database connection timeout recovery

expected_results.rationale: Database connection timeout recovery should recover gracefully

questions.question: Cache corruption detection and recovery

expected_results.rationale: Cache corruption detection and recovery should recover gracefully

questions.question: Invalid configuration error handling

expected_results.rationale: Invalid configuration error handling should recover gracefully

questions.question: High memory pressure graceful degradation

expected_results.rationale: High memory pressure graceful degradation should recover gracefully

questions.question: Execute query spanning multiple tiers (federation)

expected_results.rationale: Federated queries should aggregate results from multiple tiers

questions.pass_criteria: results from all 3 tiers AND total_latency < 500ms

questions.question: Verify metrics exported to monitoring system

expected_results.rationale: All Wave 2 metrics should integrate with monitoring stack

questions.pass_criteria: metrics exported AND dashboards updated AND alerts working

questions.question: Get routing metrics with zero queries executed

expected_results.rationale: Zero queries should not cause division by zero errors

questions.question: Handle NaN/Infinity in ML feature extraction

expected_results.rationale: NaN/Infinity should be sanitized to valid defaults

questions.pass_criteria: no NaN/Inf in final features AND prediction succeeds

questions.question: Graceful degradation when sklearn not installed

expected_results.rationale: Missing sklearn should fallback to static routing with warning

questions.pass_criteria: static routing used AND warning in logs

questions.question: Graceful degradation when boto3 not installed (Athena unavailable)

expected_results.rationale: Missing boto3 should disable Athena tier with fallback

questions.question: Handle completely empty query_params dict

expected_results.rationale: Empty params should apply sensible defaults

questions.question: Handle None values in query parameters

expected_results.rationale: None values should be replaced with defaults

questions.question: Handle extremely large estimated_rows (1 billion+)

expected_results.rationale: Billion-row queries should route to Athena without overflow

questions.question: Thread-safe stats updates with concurrent queries

expected_results.rationale: Concurrent stats updates must be thread-safe

questions.question: Handle invalid tier name in configuration

expected_results.rationale: Invalid tier names should fallback gracefully

questions.question: Handle pattern analyzer database connection failure

expected_results.rationale: Pattern recording failure should not block query execution

questions.pass_criteria: query succeeds despite pattern recording failure
